title: Industrial Age
description: Quests for the Industrial Age progression path.

quests.title: Make progress in Thermal Series
description: Complete "Make progress in Thermal Series" to continue.

quests.title: Bedrock Dust
description: Ignite a bedrock to acquire Grains of Infinity

quests.title: Pulverizer but Different
description: Original items: Block Simple Sag Mill (enderio)

rewards.command: /tellraw @p {"text":"Your world has been blessed with new rare metals."}

quests.title: Infinite Water
description: Craft a Aqueous Accumulator, put it between two water sources to produce water automatically!

quests.title: Electrified Iron
description: Empower ore crystals with an Empowerer

quests.title: Advanced Wires
description: Acquire an XNet wire, it transfers fluid, energy and items and has minimum impact on performance.

quests.title: Make progress in Ender IO
description: Complete "Make progress in Ender IO" to continue.

quests.title: Alloy Forging
description: Original items: Block Simple Alloy Smelter (enderio)

quests.title: Dark Steel
description: Obtain dark steel, which can be found in dungeons or made with alloy smelter

quests.title: Ore Doubling
description: Obtain a Pulverizer which double ores by turning them into 2x dust!

quests.title: Mystical Machine
description: Obtain an Induction Smelter. This machine is very widely used.

quests.title: Diamond But Better
description: Empower ore crystals with an Empowerer

quests.title: Superspeed Charger
description: Original items: Block Enhanced Wired Charger (enderio)

quests.title: Easy Energy
description: Original items: Block Simple Stirling Generator (enderio)

quests.title: Make progress in Ender IO
description: Complete "Make progress in Ender IO" to continue.

quests.title: 2H2O==2H2↑+O2↑
description: Craft a Electrolytic Separator which can separate hydrogen and oxygen from water

quests.title: Crush 'em
description: Obtain a Purification Chamber to crush ores into clumps

quests.title: Pulverizer
description: Obtain a Crusher which crushes ore clumps into dirty dust

quests.title: Dust to Dust
description: Obtain an Enrichment Chamber which can purify ore dusts

quests.title: Make progress in Ender IO
description: Complete "Make progress in Ender IO" to continue.

quests.title: Infused With Energy
description: Obtain an Energetic Infuser which charges a lot of items

quests.title: Make progress in Mekanism
description: Complete "Make progress in Mekanism" to continue.

quests.title: Machine
description: Obtain 1× Machine to progress in the Industrial Age path.

quests.title: Empowered Lapis
description: Empower ore crystals with an Empowerer

quests.title: Empowered Coal
description: Empower ore crystals with an Empowerer

quests.title: Water Cooling
description: Obtain a Thermal Mediator which makes nearby machines more efficient!

quests.title: Empowered Emerald
description: Empower ore crystals with an Empowerer

quests.title: Empowered Redstone
description: Empower ore crystals with an Empowerer

quests.title: Brain of the Network
description: Obtain an XNet Controller, charge it with energy and connect it to the network with a Connector.
